# GC-05: Intent Traceability

**Track:** Governance Controls (`GC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Log the original change request, all agent transformations applied during Stage 1, intermediate states, stakeholder decisions, and the final validated specification. This record forms the first link in the end-to-end audit chain and must be immutable.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 1 | Intent Ingestion | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Fully automated |
| **Agent does** | Capture all Stage 1 events, transformations, and decisions automatically; write to immutable audit log. |
| **Human does** | None during execution; review during audits. |

## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Intent audit record | log_entry | Immutable record of original request, transformations, decisions, and final specification reference. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Compliance Officer |

If traceability logging fails, Stage 1 processing is blocked until logging is restored.

## Dependencies

None

## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(6) | Documentation of ICT risk management activities including all change processing steps |
| EU AI Act | Art. 12 | Record-keeping and logging for high-risk AI systems throughout the lifecycle |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Governance & Compliance · **Owner role:** Compliance Officer
